details.question: 어제 캠페인별 클릭률(CTR)을 내림차순으로 보여줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY ctr_percent DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    campaign_id,
    ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25'
GROUP BY campaign_id
ORDER BY ctr_percent DESC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 어제 캠페인별 전환율(CVR) 상위 5개를 보여줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)), 0), 2) AS cvr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY cvr_percent DESC LIMIT 5
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    campaign_id,
    ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)), 0), 2) AS cvr_percent
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25'
GROUP BY campaign_id
HAVING SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) > 0
ORDER BY cvr_percent DESC
LIMIT 5

details.question: 어제 지역별 노출 수를 순위대로 보여줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT delivery_region, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' GROUP BY delivery_region ORDER BY impressions DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  delivery_region,
  COUNT(*) AS impressions
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%Y')
  AND month = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%m')
  AND day = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%d')
GROUP BY delivery_region
ORDER BY impressions DESC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 오늘 데스크톱/모바일/태블릿 기기별 클릭 수를 비교해줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY clicks DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    device_type,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) AS click_count
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26'
GROUP BY device_type
ORDER BY click_count DESC LIMIT 1000
details.exec_error: 양쪽 빈 결과 (데이터 없는 날짜) → PASS

FROM ad_combined_log

    AND day = '26'

details.generated_sql:

details.question: 어제 전체 광고 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수, 클릭률(CTR)을 보여줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25'
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS impressions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS clicks,
  SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) AS conversions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' LIMIT 1000

details.question: 오늘 각 캠페인별로 노출, 클릭, 전환, 전환율(CVR)을 상세 비교해줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)), 0), 2) AS cvr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY impressions DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    campaign_id,
    COUNT(*) AS impressions,
    SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS clicks,
    SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) AS conversions,
    ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)), 0), 4) AS cvr
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26'
GROUP BY campaign_id
ORDER BY campaign_id LIMIT 1000
details.exec_error: 양쪽 빈 결과 (데이터 없는 날짜) → PASS

details.question: 오늘 광고주별 노출수, 총 광고비, 전환 매출, ROAS를 한 번에 보여줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, COUNT(*) AS impressions, SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click) AS total_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY roas DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    advertiser_id,
    COUNT(*) AS impressions,
    SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click) AS total_cost,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS conversion_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click), 0) AS roas
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026' AND month = '03' AND day = '26'
GROUP BY advertiser_id
ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 1000
details.exec_error: 양쪽 빈 결과 (데이터 없는 날짜) → PASS

details.question: 2026년 3월 14일 클릭은 있지만 전환이 없는 캠페인 목록
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) > 0 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) = 0 ORDER BY clicks DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    campaign_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) AS click_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END) AS conversion_count
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026' AND month = '03' AND day = '14'
GROUP BY campaign_id
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) > 0
    AND COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END) = 0
ORDER BY click_count DESC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 14일 오전(00~11시)과 오후(12~23시) 클릭 수 비교
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END AS time_period, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END ORDER BY time_period
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END AS time_period,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS click_count
FROM ad_combined_log
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14'
GROUP BY CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END
ORDER BY time_period LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 14일 전환 타입별 총 매출과 평균 전환 가치
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT conversion_type, COUNT(*) AS conversions, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue, AVG(conversion_value) AS avg_value FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY conversion_type ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    conversion_type,
    SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(conversion_value), 2) AS avg_conversion_value
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true
GROUP BY conversion_type
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 14일 검색 키워드별 클릭수 상위 10개
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT keyword, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND keyword IS NOT NULL GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY clicks DESC LIMIT 10
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    keyword,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) AS clicks
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026' AND month = '03' AND day = '14'
GROUP BY keyword
ORDER BY clicks DESC
LIMIT 10

details.question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 일별 impression 수 추이
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  day,
  COUNT(*) AS impression
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day >= '08' AND day <= '14'
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day ASC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 광고주별 총 전환 매출
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
details.generated_sql:

    advertiser_id,
    SUM(conversion_value) AS total_conversion_value
FROM ad_combined_log_summary

    AND is_conversion = true

details.question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 광고 형식별 클릭수 합계
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY clicks DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ad_format,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) AS click_count
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026'
    AND month = '03'
    AND day IN ('08', '09', '10', '11', '12', '13', '14')
GROUP BY ad_format
ORDER BY click_count DESC LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 캠페인별 일별 평균 CTR
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, AVG(daily_ctr_percent) AS avg_ctr_percent FROM (SELECT day, campaign_id, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS daily_ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day, campaign_id) sub GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY avg_ctr_percent DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  day,
  campaign_id,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day >= '08' AND day <= '14'
GROUP BY day, campaign_id
ORDER BY day, campaign_id LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 전체 광고 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수, CTR 요약
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03'
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  SUM(CAST(1 AS BIGINT)) AS impressions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS clicks,
  SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) AS conversions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), 0) AS ctr
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026' AND month = '03' LIMIT 1000

details.question: 2026년 3월 기기 타입별 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수 비교
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY impressions DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT

details.question: 어제 CTR은 높은데 전환이 없는 캠페인을 찾아줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) > 5.0 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) = 0 ORDER BY ctr_percent DESC
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  campaign_id,
  COUNT(*) AS impressions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS clicks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END) AS conversions
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = '2026' AND month = '03' AND day = '25'
GROUP BY campaign_id
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) > 0
  AND COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END) = 0
ORDER BY ctr DESC LIMIT 1000

details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click), 0) AS roas, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY roas DESC LIMIT 5

    SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click), 0) AS roas

details.question: 2026년 2월과 3월의 월별 전체 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수를 비교해줘
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT year, month, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE (year='2026' AND month='02') OR (year='2026' AND month='03') GROUP BY year, month ORDER BY year, month
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  month,
  COUNT(*) AS impressions,
  SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) AS clicks,
  SUM(CAST(is_conversion AS INT)) AS conversions
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year='2026' AND month IN ('02', '03')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000

details.question: 오늘 모바일에서 CTR이 가장 높은 캠페인 TOP 5
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, ROUND(SUM(CAST(is_click AS INT)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS ctr_percent FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='26' AND device_type='mobile' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY ctr_percent DESC LIMIT 5

details.question: 어제 전환당 비용(CPA)이 가장 낮은 캠페인 TOP 5
details.ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpa FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='25' GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) > 0 ORDER BY cpa ASC LIMIT 5
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
    campaign_id,
    SUM(cost_per_impression + cost_per_click) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpa
FROM ad_combined_log_summary
WHERE year = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%Y')
    AND month = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%m')
    AND day = date_format(date_add('day', -1, current_date), '%d')
GROUP BY campaign_id
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion = true THEN 1 END) > 0
ORDER BY cpa ASC
LIMIT 5
